---
title: "DAGs and Run Expressions"
---

Use `run` for DAG-style execution.

## Sequence and Parallel

```yaml
run: setup -> par(lint, test) -> build
```

## Conditional Branching

```yaml
run: when(branch() == "main", deploy, notify)
```

## Multi-Branch Switch

```yaml
run: >
  switch(env("TARGET"),
    "api": build-api -> deploy-api,
    "web": build-web -> deploy-web,
    "all": par(build-api, build-web)
  )
```

## Dry-Run

```bash
qp check --dry-run
```
